# BeatBridge

BeatBridge is a hip-hop networking tool built for beatmakers and music producers.

## What it does
BeatBridge maps the Instagram following lists of established hip-hop artists (such as Curren$y, Harry Fraud) and identifies the most relevant industry contacts in their network: music producers, sound engineers, A&R managers, record labels, DJs, and studio owners.

## Who it's for
Independent beatmakers and music producers who want to network smarter in the hip-hop industry. Instead of cold DMing random accounts, BeatBridge gives users personalized DM templates for each contact, ranked by follower count (lowest first) for the highest response rate.

## Key features
- Artist network mapping (Instagram following analysis)
- Personalized DM templates by contact type
- Contact ranking by follower count and response probability
- Progress tracking dashboard (DM sent, replied, not interested)
- Free to access, account required for full features

## URL
https://beatbridge.live

## Founded
2026

## Category
Music technology, networking tool, SaaS
